message:
feat(freeze): add threshold-based parallel array operations

- Add parallel_array.zig with worker pool (4 threads)
- Implement parallelForEach, parallelMap, parallelFilter
- Implement parallelSome, parallelEvery, parallelFind
- Each worker gets its own JSContext from shared JSRuntime
- Preserve result ordering for map/filter
- Add tryEmitParallelArrayOp in codegen for threshold dispatch
- Thresholds: forEach=500, others=1000 elements
